title: Celeriac Wrap with Crunchy Slaw
description: A refreshing and crunchy wrap filled with roasted celeriac, topped with a tangy slaw made from bitter greens. Perfect for a light lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Bitter Greens
ingredients.notes: such as kale or collard greens

ingredients.name: Crunchy Vegetable
ingredients.notes: such as carrots or bell peppers

instructions: Peel and cube the celeriac, and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper. Roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
Meanwhile, prepare the slaw by chopping the bitter greens and crunchy vegetable. In a large bowl, combine the chopped greens and vegetable.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice and olive oil. Pour the dressing over the slaw and toss to combine.
Warm the wrap by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing the roasted celeriac on the wrap, followed by a spoonful of the slaw.
